_meta.purpose: AI-readable project context. Paste at start of any AI conversation to instantly onboard.

project.name: Casper
project.note: ALWAYS edit worktree, not local_path — servers run from worktree

backend.stack: FastAPI + SQLAlchemy 2.0 async + SQLite (aiosqlite) + Alembic + JWT
backend.alembic_note: Always use batch_alter_table() for ALTER TABLE (SQLite limitation)

models.User: id, name, email, password_hash, role(super_admin|admin|viewer), is_active
models.Platform: id, name, cr_charge:float, cr_percentage:float, default_ad_pct:float=0, default_profit_pct:float=20, is_active, tiers:relationship
models.SkuPlatformConfig: id, sku_pricing_id(FK), platform_id(FK), ad_pct:float|null, profit_pct:float|null, platform_sku_name:str|null
models.GlobalSettings: id, key, value — CLASS NAME IS GlobalSettings (plural)
models.HsnCode: id, code, description, gst_rate:float, category, is_custom
models.Sku: id, shringar_sku(unique,UPPERCASE), vendor_sku, vendor_id(Optional FK), category_id(Optional FK), hsn_code_id(Optional FK), series, description, is_active
models.SkuPricing: id, sku_id(FK), platform_id(FK), price, package, logistics, addons, misc_total, gst, profit_percentage, cr_percentage, cr_cost, damage_percentage, damage_cost, breakeven(stored), net_profit_20(stored), bs_wo_gst(stored), bank_settlement(stored), platform_configs:relationship

backend.schema_gotcha: vendor_id and category_id in sku.py Pydantic schema MUST be Optional[int] = None — non-optional causes 500

api_routes.GET /entries/: all SKUs with platform_configs for SKU page
api_routes.POST /entries/upsert-batch: {rows:[...]} create/update multiple rows incl platform overrides

frontend.stack: React 18 + Vite, plain CSS + CSS vars, Axios, React Router v6, no Redux

pages./skus: SKUs page — main daily working page ✅
pages./sku-analysis: SKU Analysis — NOT BUILT (no route exists)

sku_page_columns.SKU group: Vendor (sticky) | SKU (sticky) | Series | V.Short | Vendor SKU | Category
sku_page_columns.Unit Economics: Price | Package | Logistics | Addons | Misc | CR% | CR₹ | Dmg% | Dmg₹
sku_page_columns.Profitability: Breakeven | Profit% | Profit₹ | BS w/o GST

table_pattern.column_sizing: Hidden span sizer (.ec-sizer-wrap) drives width — NOT CSS min-width
table_pattern.inputs: size={1} on all inputs — removes browser default ~170px inflation
table_pattern.height: page-content flex-col → entries-page flex:1 → e-scroll flex:1 min-height:0

pricing_formula.note: AD is PER-PLATFORM since 2026-04-02. Base breakeven has NO ad.
steps: breakeven = price + package + logistics + addons + misc + cr_cost + damage_cost
ad_amt = price × ad_pct / 100  [ad_pct: SKU override → platform.default_ad_pct]

key_decisions.dark_mode: Add AFTER all pages complete in light theme
key_decisions.tracker: See tracker/ folder for MEMORY, PROGRESS, ROADMAP, DECISIONS

ideas_parked.pricing_insight_simulator: What-if price changes → impact on profit per platform
ideas_parked.sku_analysis_insights: Return rates, best platform per SKU, margin ranking, below-breakeven warnings
ideas_parked.reports_with_badge: Backend generates Excel/PDF → badge on sidebar → user downloads
